overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character cooking meat over a campfire during golden hour in a rocky prairie wilderness. The character kneels by the fire, tends to the cooking meat, and then consumes it as the sun sets behind distant rock formations.

events.description: character places raw flap meat on a stick and holds it over the campfire flames to cook
character takes a bite of the cooked meat from the stick

agents.ego_description: kneeling beside the campfire, cooking flap meat over the open flame and then consuming it

entered.detail: crackling campfire with bright orange flames surrounded by stones
large layered rock outcropping silhouetted against the setting sun
body of water visible in the valley below reflecting the golden light
golden dry grass covering the prairie ground around the campsite

segments.scene_description: The character kneels beside a crackling campfire in an open prairie wilderness during golden hour. Rocky cliffs rise in the background against the setting sun while a distant lake glimmers in the valley. The character cooks meat over the flames and then consumes it as the fire flickers warmly in the fading light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement centered on a character tending a campfire as the golden hour light fades over a rocky prairie wilderness. It begins with the character kneeling beside the crackling flames, with the warm glow of the fire contrasting against the vast open landscape. As the character cooks and then consumes the meat, the camera captures the flickering light shifting in intensity against the backdrop of rising rocky cliffs. The scene then expands to reveal a glimmering lake in the distant valley, while the surrounding environment gradually transitions from the vibrant hues of sunset to the deepening shadows of the fading light.
